Indonesia's Next Top Model (INTM) adalah program televisi yang didasarkan pada lisensi America's Next Top Model, di mana peserta bersaing menunjukkan bakat dan kemampuannya untuk mendapatkan gelar Indonesia’s Next Top Model dan berkesempatan memulai karir mereka di dunia modeling.

Peserta akan mendapatkan tantangan yang berhubungan dengan modeling sesuai konsep yang telah ditentukan dengan penilaian dari juri-juri yang kompeten di bidangnya.

snippet.title: Honda CITY Hatchback 2021 Indonesia
snippet.description:
Sudah belasan tahun Honda Jazz membangun nama di Indonesia sebagai mobil pilihan anak muda yang punya penampilan trendi, praktis, bertenaga dan irit. Sudah tiga generasi Honda Jazz hadir di Indonesia mulai dari Jazz GD3 yang punya pilihan mesin i-DSI dan VTEC, Jazz GE8 yang pakai mesin i-VTEC dan Jazz GK5 yang ternyata menjadi Honda Jazz generasi terakhir di Indonesia.

Setelah Honda Jazz pamit dari pasar Indonesia, Honda Prospect Motor selaku APM Honda di Indonesia kini memperkenalkan Honda City hatchback RS sebagai pengganti Honda Jazz. Versi sedan belum diketahui kapan akan diperkenalkan, jadi untuk sementara kita akan berkenalan lebih dulu dengan Honda City hatchback yang saat ini hanya tersedia dalam varian RS.

Selain desain sporty ciri khas Honda RS, City hatchback memiliki interior baru yang memadukan bahan-bahan berbeda, head unit canggih dan kepraktisan di atas rata-rata. Selain itu, mobil ini bahkan dibekali mesin baru yang bisa diaktifkan via remote seperti Honda Civic, Honda CR-V dan Honda Accord. Apa lagi yang menarik di Honda City hatchback RS?

en.title: This rich handsome guy holding me tightly, making my ex-boyfriend so jealous.

th.title: หนุ่มหล่อรวยคนนี้กอดฉันไว้แน่นทำให้แฟนเก่าหึงมาก

fr.title: Ce beau mec riche me tient fermement, ce qui rend mon ex-petit ami si jaloux.

de.title: Dieser reiche, gutaussehende Mann hält mich fest und macht meinen Ex-Freund so eifersüchtig.

es.title: Este chico rico y guapo me abrazó con fuerza, poniendo a mi exnovio tan celoso.

snippet.title: Zack Snyder’s Justice League | Official Trailer #2 | HBO Max
snippet.description:
In Zack Snyder's Justice League, determined to ensure Superman’s (Henry Cavill) ultimate sacrifice was not in vain, Bruce Wayne (Ben Affleck) aligns forces with Diana Prince (Gal Gadot) with plans to recruit a team of metahumans to protect the world from an approaching threat of catastrophic proportions. The task proves more difficult than Bruce imagined, as each of the recruits must face the demons of their own pasts to transcend that which has held them back, allowing them to come together, finally forming an unprecedented league of heroes. Now united, Batman (Affleck), Wonder Woman (Gadot), Aquaman (Jason Momoa), Cyborg (Ray Fisher), and The Flash (Ezra Miller) may be too late to save the planet from Steppenwolf, DeSaad, and Darkseid and their dreadful intentions.

Subscribe: http://bit.ly/HBOMaxYouTube

Be the first to know more:

snippet.title: iKON - ‘왜왜왜 (Why Why Why)’ M/V
snippet.description:
왜왜왜 (Why Why Why)

사람에서 사랑으로
인연에서 연인으로
이별 없이 영원할 줄 알았는데
 
사실 아직도 거짓말 같죠 
활짝 웃으며 올 것만 같죠
아름다웠던 모습 그대로 

이제 와서야 후회만 해요
웃는 게 이쁜 그댈 울리기만 했죠
내가 바란 건 이게 아닌데

결국 이 지경 이 꼴이지 나란 놈
지켜주지도 못했지 너란 꽃
빨갛게 불타오르던 우리 모든 게 
하얗게 재만 남았죠 

사람에서 사랑으로
인연에서 연인으로
아름다운 사랑 꽃을 피웠는데

꽃을 피웠는데

웃음은 왜 울음이 돼
님에서 남이 돼버린 그대
이별 없이 영원할 줄 알았는데
우린 왜 왜 왜

내 꿈속에서도 멀어지는 너
아무것도 난 할 수가 없죠
멈춰보려 소리쳐도
눈을 뜨면 사라지죠
왜 네가 있을 때 잘해야 했던 걸
그때 난 몰랐을까
왜 모든 것들을 잃고 난 후에
소중함을 알게 될까

결국 이 지경 이 꼴이지 나란 놈
지켜주지도 못했지 너란 꽃
빨갛게 불타오르던 우리 모든 게
하얗게 재만 남았죠

사람에서 사랑으로
인연에서 연인으로
아름다운 사랑 꽃을 피웠는데

꽃을 피웠는데

웃음은 왜 울음이 돼
님에서 남이 돼버린 그대
이별 없이 영원할 줄 알았는데
우린 왜 왜 왜

그때 마지막인 줄 알았다면 조금 더
네 모습을 담아뒀을 텐데

단 한 번도 사랑하지 않은 적 없죠
처음부터 지금까지도

The official YouTube channel of Atlantic Records artist Bruno Mars. 11x GRAMMY Award winner and 27x GRAMMY Award nominee Bruno Mars is a celebrated singer, songwriter, producer, and musician with iconic hits like "The Lazy Song", "That's What I Like", "Just The Way You Are", "24K Magic", "Locked Out Of Heaven", and "When I Was Your Man". His legendary body of work also includes blockbuster albums such as Doo-Wops & Hooligans, Unorthodox Jukebox, and 24K Magic, as well as era-defining collaborations like "Uptown Funk" with Mark Ronson, "Finesse" with Cardi B, and "Nothin' On You" with B.o.B. Forever classic, yet supremely innovative, Bruno continues to redefine music, style, and popular culture, pushing the boundaries of pop, R&B, funk, soul, hip-hop, and dance, and remains as influential as ever.

The official YouTube channel of Atlantic Records artist Bruno Mars. 11x GRAMMY Award winner and 27x GRAMMY Award nominee Bruno Mars is a celebrated singer, songwriter, producer, and musician with iconic hits like "The Lazy Song", "That's What I Like", "Just The Way You Are", "24K Magic", "Locked Out Of Heaven", and "When I Was Your Man". snippet.title: Bicara Soal Politik, Felix Siauw : Kekuatan Itu Milik Umat, Tapi Kedaulatan Itu Milik Allah | tvOne
snippet.description:
Jakarta, https://www.tvOnenews.com - Sebagai penceramah agama Islam, Ustaz Felix Siauw memberikan pandangannya mengenai polemik anti vaksin di Indonesia. Bersama dengan host kita, Indy Rahmawati, Ustaz Felix Siauw lebih lanjut berbagi pemikiran mengenai kudeta zaman nabi dan bagaimana peristiwa Isra Miraj terjadi. 

Simak penjelasan lengkapnya hanya di 1 Jam 1000 Pesan!

Saksikan live streaming tvOne hanya di https://www.tvonenews.com/live
